# Luxury and Blush Events

> Luxury and Blush Events is a luxury destination wedding planning studio in Mexico, led by founder and creative director Thelma. With 20 years of experience and 404 weddings realized across 16 destinations, the studio specializes in editorial, high-end destination weddings — full wedding planning, floral design (botanical art) and day-of coordination.

Key facts:
- Founder & creative director: Thelma
- Based in: Guadalajara, Jalisco, México
- Experience: 20 years, 404 weddings realized, 16 destinations, 100% custom design
- Destinations: Tulum, Cancún, Playa del Carmen, Puerto Vallarta, Punta de Mita, Chapala, Ajijic, Tequila, Mazamitla, San Miguel de Allende, Guadalajara, Paris, Versailles
- Services: Full Wedding Planning, Floral Design & Decoration, Day-Of Coordination
- Budget tiers: $20–35K, $35–50K, $50K+ USD; limited number of "Premiere" weddings per year
- Featured in: Style Me Pretty, Wedding Chicks, Green Wedding Shoes, PartySlate, bodas.com.mx, WEDVIBES.MEDIA
- Contact: WhatsApp +52 33 3968 6925 · Instagram @luxury.and.blush

## Pages

- [Wedding Gallery (this site)](https://luxuryandblushgallery.com/): Photo gallery of real luxury weddings, destinations and floral art by Luxury and Blush Events, with FAQ
- [Main website](https://luxuryandblush.com/luxury-and-blush/index.html): Concept, destinations, services, casting form
- [Reviews](https://luxuryandblush.com/luxury-and-blush/reviews.html): Client reviews and testimonials
